name: Gunner 14x16 Porch Shed Plan - A Gable-Roof Retreat with Spacious Covered Porch
open_features: 14x16 Gable Shed with Full Covered Porch - A perfect balance of indoor utility & outdoor relaxation
DIY-Friendly Build - Clear framing layouts and step-by-step diagrams
Barn-Style Double Doors - Wide access for equipment, motorcycles, tools, or hobby gear
Cozy Cottage Aesthetic - Traditional gable profile, warm siding, and handcrafted detailing
Multi-Purpose Functionality - Great as a workshop, studio, storage shed, home office, or garden retreat
Porch: Large covered front porch for relaxing, reading, or staging garden tools
Interior: Spacious open layout for storage, workspace, or customization
description_summary: Bring warmth, charm, and purpose to your backyard with the Gunner Porch Shed Plan, a beautifully crafted 14x16 gable-roof shed featuring a full-width covered porch and timeless cottage appeal. Designed for homeowners who want functionality and outdoor comfort, this plan blends indoor workspace with an inviting porch that's perfect for lounging, gardening, or creative projects.
